description.unified: Shoots 12 arrows to random enemies and deals a total of ??? P.DMG.
Upon attacking, summons 5 arrows that launch towards the enemy. Each arrow deals ??? P.DMG.

Fires an arrow in a straight line, dealing P.DMG to all enemies in range based on the target's remaining HP. Deals a maximum of ??? P.DMG and knocks down the target. Against Bosses, deals additional ??? P.DMG that ignores DEF.
Upon attacking, increases ATK by ??? and Crit Chance by 100 for [5 sec->10 sec]. This effect stacks up to [6 times->3 times].

dark.unified: There is a 50% chance to inflict Stun for [0.6 sec->1 sec].

light.unified: Ignores DEF when there is only 1 enemy [(removed) Summons 2 additional arrows].
Reduces Mana Cost by 1 [(removed) Damage dealt is increased by 40%].
Max stack number is changed to 5 [(removed) Attack Speed is increased by 8% per stack].

dark.unified: At the beginning of each battle, increases ATK. This effect stacks up to max 10 times, and upon reaching 10 stacks, increases DMG dealt to bosses by 20%. This effect is irremovable.

description.unified: [Moonlight Flash] DMG is increased by {0}% and target takes 20% additional P.DMG for 10 sec.
[Moonlight Arrow] Increases ATK Spd by [(added) 100] and each stack increases DMG to Non-Hero enemies by {0}% [(removed) normal attack DMG by 50%].
Upon a Crit Hit, ATK Spd is increased by {0} for 10 sec, and for the duration of skill, each auto attack fires an arrow that deals extra {1}% P.DMG.
